name: Perogy Cilantro Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In your favorite soup pot (preferably with a thick base), melt the butter or heat the oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion, garlic, and cilantro. Fry until soft.
3. Add tomatoes. Reduce heat to just below medium.
4. Continue frying for about one minute longer.
5. Stir in 1.5 cups of water.
6. Chop the remaining 2 perogies into small pieces.
7. Add all of the perogies and a small dash of tabasco to the soup.
8. Simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
